Archon for Justicar Bey, you were charged with performing one last task for him before the changing of the Justicarite.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.

rows: Archon for Justicar Bey, you were charged with performing one last task for him before the changing of the Justicarite.

Embraced at the end of the Great War out of the ruins of the Ottaman Army, you thought you had simply moved from one existence as a soldier to the next, serving the will of the Eldest and the Mountain. But being a soldier doesn't make you mindless. You saw that there was something not well with the caste, that the unquestioning obedience was leading the entire clan into ruin. When Ur-Shulgi broke the curse and demanded utter allegiance, you fled with the Viziers rather than bound yourself once again to a bloody war and a mad cause. The Camarilla was distrustful of your clan in general, and you as a warrior in particular, but you had a skill set that was useful and experience in the Ashirra courts. Your skills got your work and notice, and when your brother warrior, Bobby Santos, reached out to you to serve under the new Tremere Justicar, it seemed like a good opportunity. Still, it was a risk, you knew that Justicar Ulgan Bey was one of the key players in the Tremere curse of your entire clan and there were many Assamites, especially warriors, who warned you not to work for one as suspicious and treacherous as Justicar Bey. That said, Bey was known to be fair minded to the Assamites and worked closely with several, working behind the scenes to provide them sanctuary and respectability in the Camarilla. You agreed, and joined Bobby in Bey's wars in Asia, fighting against the Wan Kuei and pushing the Camarilla cause against the strange and mysterious so-called Asian vampires. You've seen strange things in Asia, odd, mystical things, the likes of which you haven't seen since the Ashirra courts. You're no sorcerer or vizier, but you're not an idiot either, and between the Tremere you've served and the Cathayans you've fought, you've gained more insight into the world of the occult than you ever thought you would.

For seven years you've been in Asia, and the Tremere have had wild success over there. There has been some speculation on if the war would continue once Bey's term as Justicar ended, as he has openly said he would likely not seek another term. You've heard rumors that Bey has been research something, looking for information on some sort of ritual or spell, but you don't know the details. All you know is that for the last few months, the Justicar has been seculded in research. One of his other archons, Isha Patel, another Tremere, has passed on an assignment from him for you. In his research, he's discovered he needs to get back magical amuletes he created while fighting demons in Los Angeles years ago. He's called upon a boon he has held over you to ask you to do this, despite the fact his tenure as Justicar is coming up. If you gather all the amulets and return them to Patel, your debt to the Justicar will be paid in full and you are free to seek employment elsewhere. The problem is, no one has seen the amulets in years, and even Patel doesn't know where they are outside of Los Angeles. More than that, you aren't sure what they are or what they do, so you have no way of knowing if there is a way to get more of them. So, you are off in a wild goose chase in LA, hoping you find what the Justicar needs so you can get the hell out of Asia once and for all and find another cause to serve.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Find out the story behind these amulets and what they were for and if they might happen to be around.
Start putting out feelers for next steps and others you may serve once you have paid off your debt to the Justicar.

You are a warrior with some esoteric knowledge for one of your caste. This is both useful to you and desirable to others. Find other people you can begin working with and perhaps create a network or coterie of such information.

rows: So what you learn on the amulet, you know that Isha Patel told you that the Pontifex used these amulets to give to people before battling known infernalists. Your research doesn't appear to find anything about a spell or any other ritual that protects others against infernalism, but then again, Pontifex Bey is very old and a former mage, so who knows! That said, you do find a few different amulet spells, though the one that sounds the most like what Patel has told you is that there is a ritual where you can imbue an amulet with a part of your own soul and will in order to control the minds of others more easily. Basically, it's almost like a portable Dominate ritual, you give it to someone and they will see or do what you request of them. Considering that there are 7 of these floating around in LA and Bey used them in a battle against the last Pontifex, make of that what you will. As for where they are in LA, the only guide for that is to figure out what they were used for and who got them. Patel has told you it was a battle against the infernal involving the former Tremere Justicar and that he fell in it as it turned out he was himself infernal. She told you that it was led by Bey and involved the then prince, Dafne Pictor, and members of the then court, including Bobby Santos (whose amulet is the one you have now), the Brujah Lupo Salamanca, an Assamite Cody West, a Tremere Franklin Richards, the Gangrels Andy Watkins and Hakkon, and several others. The one she knows for sure had one were Salamanca and Watkins. The Prince's one she believed was left behind in the chantry as she kept it with all her records there. She's unsure if any of the others mentioned had one and if so where they would be at.

Basically, it's almost like a portable Dominate ritual, you give it to someone and they will see or do what you request of them. rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.

I want to use my Occult (3) and Lore (2) and Investigation (2) and utilize my library (3) to get as much additional information about the amulets as I can. I spoke to several Tremere (forgot their names, will add ASAP) during the last game, and they said they were going to help look for the amulet, and any info they could find as well.

I will work on looking for and training a proper retainer. I will begin the search within close  current & past relationships during the 7 years I was in Asia. I will also consider those who have been in my employ as loyal and trustworthy guards, my former students & teacher assistants from when I taught at UCLA. I expect this will take some time, but I am looking for my "Alfred" or "Little John" or better yet, "Wong" of Dr. Strange. Perhaps someone who could even become a ghoul at some point. But someone I already trust, could train, and someone who is extremely competent.

Continue to expand my collection of rare books, tomes, scrolls, artifacts and weapons that I have in my library. I will do this personally. But I will also have contacts and associates helping out. I will also utilize my relationship with the Tremere of Los Angeles, and those who like and respect Justicar Bey, to aid me. I am happy to role play any significant "finds" in game, as well as repay such "finds" with either trade or favors or both, if the item is significant enough.  Books and items I focus on would be esoteric, such as demon hunting, demon binding/banishing, "magical" weapons that have special properties of protection, or means of hurting supernatural entities that endanger kindred. Of course, items of great age are always of more interest to me.

Search for the Amulet. Of course, I will do this in tandem with my previous action, but as much as I can do during downtime to find the amulet, or get leads that I can utilize in the next game to find & obtain the amulet, I will. This includes, with the previous DT spend, get information... so if my DT reveals that somebody who may have the amulet, is also interested in another item, I would try to obtain that item, so that I have leverage to use in the next game.  Be it information, an item, or an action... my focus is getting information and leverage to utilize in the next game.

2XP - Buy Level 1 herd. While I am buying it now, I would like to say they have been my herd for a while, as they are several members of my haven staff. Those who are the most trusted, and been in my employ the longest.   2XP - Buy Level 1 Security Skill. My role both in service to Justicar Bey, as well as me being an old Assamite warrior and assassin, I really feel I need to buy that skill.
I have additional flavor background to submit, but will do so on a separate document.
